{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324013908951BBF3B2CD51922E759"}"},"total":1450},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543112653273056024","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说以商周更替为背景，将神话传说与历史脉络巧妙融合，塑造出姜子牙、哪吒等经典神祇形象，其宏大的封神体系与奇幻的斗法场景，不仅构建了独特的东方神话宇宙，更借神佛之争暗喻人间道义与权力更迭，成为中国古典神魔小说的里程碑之作，至今仍以多样形式影响着大众文化。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756269725,"group_id":"7197632590650543159","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzPlyi0QmXoustqtBUMzeKVxmPyUnU9Eme+XEaDpvfLb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2894345935002996","user_name":"爱吃酸辣白菜的北冥鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2894345935002996","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197632590650543159","book_info":{"abstract":"现代人穿越到封神世界，成为殷商太子殷郊，面对皇后即将被折磨而死、自己也要被迫逃亡的命运，殷郊大胆说不。
他殷郊不但要挽救殷商六百多年的江山，更要在将来与昊天上帝平起平坐。
当然，若是能娶到龙吉公主，殷郊也不介意叫对方一声老丈人。
十二金仙：“你才修炼几年？为何有几十万年的法力？”
殷郊：“不好意思，一切全靠捡。”
十二金仙:“那你怀中的女仙？”
殷郊:“也是捡的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef553cfe0c7bfca04357f191845930c8","author":"长青余","author_id":"","book_id":"7197632590650543159","book_name":"穿越封神当太子，先得乾坤弓","book_short_name":"大商太子","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7197684503635034681","read_count":"16155","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"626456"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"299","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09b7eec5f5ed76075253bc5555852a42~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471548&x-signature=xLHPJit2ILzXsBmggobq%2BkLLBIM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2845181924097598","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324013908951BBF3B2CD51922E759"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4046,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9897,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1531},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick": author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263421557836923700","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书确实挺好的。追了三天，全程读下来没有毒点儿。
这本书构建了一个比较新颖的封神道统体系。有一点比较不错的，就是作者构建的这个体系，他后期能够完全顺着这个思路下来，全程很连贯。
网文小说追了不少了，现在有点免疫性了。很多小说看几十章就退了。对这本评价比较中肯，不至于说是像刚接触小说那样对这篇内容非常沉迷，但是也会让人想读下去。
在这儿要给作者点个赞。爽文小说看多了，看这种进度稍微慢一点的还挺舒服，整体文章的脉络和进度也可以。作者很有自己的节奏感。期待作者的下一本新书。(๑˙ー˙๑)","text_exts":[{"e":181,"s":177,"text":"爽文小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742875481922E759%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227263421557836923700%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197632590650543159%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691147168,"group_id":"7197632590650543159","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1rl5PMJSwTzwZrcwJeT4q8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"289879643133800","user_name":"喜欢牌子锣鼓的嘎达"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"289879643133800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744229076,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197632590650543159","book_info":{"abstract":"现代人穿越到封神世界，成为殷商太子殷郊，面对皇后即将被折磨而死、自己也要被迫逃亡的命运，殷郊大胆说不。
